Before gegenpressing, there was THIS.

Arrigo Sacchi's AC Milan perfected the high line & offside trap in the late 80s. They won back-to-back European Cups, forcing opponents into submission. Absolute tactical mastery that changed defending forever.

#MilanLegends #FootballTactics #HistoryOfFootball
